accurate.why: The summary is a truncated fragment of dollar figures and makes no coherent claim about the bill; it omits the bill's actual purpose entirely.

no_hallucinations.why: The partial figures present ($12M FY2027, $13M FY2028) match the bill text and nothing false is asserted.

states_purpose.why: The summary never identifies the bill's purpose of reauthorizing a youth prevention and recovery initiative under the SUPPORT Act.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The summary fails to mention that the bill amends Section 7102 of the SUPPORT for Patients and Communities Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: The bill contains no material exceptions or carve-outs to summarize.

effective_dates.why: The summary fragmentarily lists some fiscal years but omits FY2029 and FY2030 and provides no coherent timing context.

major_provisions_covered.why: The summary misses the essential operative effect (reauthorizing the youth prevention/recovery program) and only fragmentarily lists appropriation figures.

objective_tone.why: The fragment contains no advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: The summary is a truncated, incoherent fragment beginning mid-number ('00,000') with no sentence structure.

concise.why: The fragment is brief with no padding or boilerplate.

correct_entities.why: The summary names no agencies, programs, or statutes to evaluate.

correct_figures.why: The figures shown ($12,000,000 FY2027 and $13,000,000 FY2028) are correct per the bill text.
